calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Steven Philipp (Petitioner/Current Trustee).
David Levin (Proposed Successor Trustee) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Conrad stated that he is not aware of any opposition, that everyone is on board, and that the Current Trustee lives in Florida, but the principal place of trust administration has been in his office. Mr. Conrad also stated that Ms. Philipp paid the bills, that the Mother resides in San Francisco, and that the Siblings still live in the house and provide care. Mr. Levin stated that he does not have a permanent address in San Francisco. The Court raised the issue of the trust instrument stating that the Trustee could appoint a Corporate Trustee, that it was amended to take out that restriction and then amended again to put it back in. Mr. Conrad stated that it is uneconomical to have a Corporate Trustee, that they may not be able to get one, that it is not a big trust, that it is a house in San Francisco and that he has not made an investigation as to whether a Corporate Trustee would be willing to serve. Mr. Conrad also stated that it has been his experience that Corporate Trustee's do not like to take trusts that are below a certain value, that the other assets are a vacation home in Cassadero and an unimproved lot in Utah, that the Trustee has an account, but it is getting down in money, that the Petitioner feels bond does not need to be required because of Mr. Levin's experience and that they are asking that the Court not retain Court supervision. The Court granted the Petition for Appointment of David Levin as Successor Trustee subject to posting of bond in an appropriate amount (subject to receipt and review of the order) and with the understanding that if something is needed again with Mr. Levin being the Trustee, it will need to be done in the appropriate venue. Mr. Conrad is to provide an order that includes the amount of bond and file a declaration explaining how the amount of bond was calculated.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
